title: Design a Logo for a Tech Company
scenario: Create a prompt that instructs an LLM to generate a high-quality logo for a tech company. The logo should include a clear and simple design, a color scheme that reflects the company's values, and a scalable vector graphics (SVG) format. The output should be an SVG file.
constraints: Must include a high-level description of the company

evaluationCriteria.description: The originality and creativity of the logo design.
The use of consistent colors throughout the logo, including the background and text.
Whether the output adheres to all specified constraints.
